test.notes: All tests pass across all crates including doc-tests. No test failures detected.

typecheck.notes: Clippy still fails with same errors as round 1: (1) unused variable `policy_ranges` in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/network.rs:317, (2) doc_lazy_continuation in vendor/bittensor-rs/src/subtensor.rs:328, (3) dead_code: SdkResponse, SdkResponseToolCall, SdkResponseFunctionCall, SdkUsage structs never constructed in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/llm.rs:605-627, (4) function parse_openai_response never used in llm.rs:687, (5) methods resolve_and_validate_ip and validate_ip_against_policy never used in network.rs:505-536, (6) type_complexity in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/storage.rs:308. None of these issues were fixed since round 1.

lint.notes: Formatting differences still present in: bins/platform-sudo/src/main.rs, bins/validator-node/src/main.rs, scripts/test-command-execution/src/main.rs, scripts/validate-test-commands/src/main.rs, scripts/validate-workspace-yaml/src/main.rs, tests/error_cases.rs, vendor/bittensor-rs/src/crv4/drand.rs. None of these issues were fixed since round 1.

reviewsSummary.skippedReason: Validators failed again (clippy and fmt, identical to round 1). Feature review was not attempted per scrutiny procedure — validators must pass first.

blockingIssues.description: cargo clippy -- -D warnings fails with exit code 101. Identical issues to round 1 remain unfixed: dead_code in wasm-runtime-interface (SdkResponse/SdkResponseToolCall/SdkResponseFunctionCall/SdkUsage structs, parse_openai_response fn, resolve_and_validate_ip/validate_ip_against_policy methods), unused variable policy_ranges in network.rs, doc_lazy_continuation in vendor/bittensor-rs, and type_complexity in storage.rs.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Fix features 'fix-cargo-clippy-warnings' and 'fix-cargo-fmt-formatting' from code-improvements milestone must be completed first, OR these clippy issues must be fixed directly: (a) prefix unused var with underscore, (b) add #[allow(dead_code)] or remove dead structs/fns, (c) add indentation to doc comment continuation, (d) add type alias for complex return type.

blockingIssues.description: cargo fmt -- --check fails with exit code 1. Same 7 files from round 1 still have formatting differences.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Run `cargo fmt` to auto-fix all formatting issues. This is a one-command fix.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mandatory pre-commit validation rule: all Rust workers MUST run `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` before marking a feature complete. This should be a hard gate, not a suggestion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Two consecutive scrutiny rounds (rounds 1 and 2) failed due to the same unfixed fmt and clippy issues. The fix-cargo-fmt-formatting and fix-cargo-clippy-warnings features exist in the code-improvements milestone but are still pending, while dataset-validation features were completed with these issues present.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding fmt/clippy fixes as a dependency for the dataset-validation milestone, or ensure the code-improvements milestone runs before dataset-validation scrutiny.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The dataset-validation milestone's scrutiny validator cannot pass because of code quality issues that belong to the code-improvements milestone. The milestones have a cross-dependency that isn't captured in the feature graph.
